text: In this space, the cool, polished surfaces and geometric arrangements make me feel detached and contemplative—almost as if time is paused and I'm free to observe reality with precision. The emptiness echoes with possibility but also with a hint of alienation. Moving into the next room, the bold colors and experimental displays transition me into curiosity—a reflective mood. The focus on research, innovation, and how humans relate to technology triggers my philosophical mind to muse on the evolving nature of humanity and our creations. Here, I sense both the excitement of discovery and the strangeness of the unknown.
